languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

languages.text: "С вашей точки зрения я путаю причину и следствие. Вера, являясь наивысшей директивой, наполняет смыслом любые действия. Омниссия знает все, постигает все, и мы делаем смыслом своей жизни уподобление ему. Ваши аргументы импонируют мне и даруют благодатную почву для размышлений".

"So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."
languages.original_text: "С вашей точки зрения я путаю причину и следствие. Вера, являясь наивысшей директивой, наполняет смыслом любые действия. Омниссия знает все, постигает все, и мы делаем смыслом своей жизни уподобление ему. Ваши аргументы импонируют мне и даруют благодатную почву для размышлений".

traits.locale_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

"So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

"So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

languages.text: «Como puede ver, estoy confundiendo las causas con los efectos. La fe, como directiva suprema, otorga significado a cada uno de nuestros actos. El Omnissiah lo sabe todo y lo comprende todo, y nosotros damos sentido a nuestras vidas imitándolo. Estoy impresionado con sus argumentos. Me han proporcionado mucho sobre lo que reflexionar».
languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

traits.locale_text: «Como puede ver, estoy confundiendo las causas con los efectos. La fe, como directiva suprema, otorga significado a cada uno de nuestros actos. El Omnissiah lo sabe todo y lo comprende todo, y nosotros damos sentido a nuestras vidas imitándolo. Estoy impresionado con sus argumentos. Me han proporcionado mucho sobre lo que reflexionar».

languages.text: “那么，在您看来，是我混淆了因果。信仰作为最高指引，赋予了我们每一个行动以意义。欧姆尼赛亚无所不知，无所不晓，而我们生命的意义就是去效仿祂。您的论点让我印象深刻，也给了我很多可以深入思考的方向。”
languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

traits.locale_text: “那么，在您看来，是我混淆了因果。信仰作为最高指引，赋予了我们每一个行动以意义。欧姆尼赛亚无所不知，无所不晓，而我们生命的意义就是去效仿祂。您的论点让我印象深刻，也给了我很多可以深入思考的方向。”

languages.text: « Alors, selon vous, je mélange la cause et l'effet. La foi, en tant que directive suprême, donne du sens à chacune de nos actions. L'Omnimessie sait tout et comprend tout, et Son émulation guide nos vies. Vos arguments m'impressionnent, ils vont me donner matière à réflexion. »
languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

traits.locale_text: « Alors, selon vous, je mélange la cause et l'effet. La foi, en tant que directive suprême, donne du sens à chacune de nos actions. L'Omnimessie sait tout et comprend tout, et Son émulation guide nos vies. Vos arguments m'impressionnent, ils vont me donner matière à réflexion. »

languages.text: "Also, so wie Ihr es seht, verwechsle ich Ursache und Wirkung. Glaube als oberste Direktive gibt allem, was wir tun, eine Bedeutung. Der Omnissiah weiß alles, begreift alles, und wir machen es uns zur Lebensaufgabe, Ihn nachzuahmen. Eure Argumente beeindrucken mich. Sie sind für mich ein fruchtbarer Boden, um nachzudenken."
languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

traits.locale_text: "Also, so wie Ihr es seht, verwechsle ich Ursache und Wirkung. Glaube als oberste Direktive gibt allem, was wir tun, eine Bedeutung. Der Omnissiah weiß alles, begreift alles, und wir machen es uns zur Lebensaufgabe, Ihn nachzuahmen. Eure Argumente beeindrucken mich. Sie sind für mich ein fruchtbarer Boden, um nachzudenken."

languages.text: 「つまり、私は原因と結果を混同しているのだ。信仰は最高の指令として、私たちのあらゆる行動に意味を与える。全知全能の神はすべてを知っておられ、すべてを理解しておられる。私はあなたの議論に感銘を受けている。彼らは私に考えるための肥沃な土壌を与えてくれました」。
languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

languages.text: "Anladığım kadarıyla neden-sonuç ilişkisini karıştırıyorum. İnanç, en yüce direktif olarak her eylemimize anlam katar. Hermesih her şeyi bilir, her şeyi idrak eder ve biz O'nu örnek almayı hayatımızın anlamı hâline getiririz. Argümanlarınızdan etkilendim. Bana derinlemesine düşünmem için verimli bir zemin sundular."
languages.original_text: "So, as you see it, I am confusing cause and effect. Faith, as the supreme directive, grants meaning to our every action. The Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all, and we make it the meaning of our lives to emulate Him. I am impressed by your arguments. They have given me fertile ground for reflection."

traits.locale_text: "Anladığım kadarıyla neden-sonuç ilişkisini karıştırıyorum. İnanç, en yüce direktif olarak her eylemimize anlam katar. Hermesih her şeyi bilir, her şeyi idrak eder ve biz O'nu örnek almayı hayatımızın anlamı hâline getiririz. Argümanlarınızdan etkilendim. Bana derinlemesine düşünmem için verimli bir zemin sundular."
